goal: Clarify the external CUDA operator packet sequence so operators keep the checkout containing the packet and treat packet.git.head as the required-file source commit, not a checkout target that could hide the current packet.
head: c38ff33
blocked_scope: Changing model catalog pins, hashes, or release acceptance policy
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may only clarify external CUDA operator packet checkout guidance, update focused generator tests, refresh packet artifacts, update LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD contract.
required_commands: rg -n -- "Keep this packet file from the current checkout|packet.git.head is the required committed file source|verified_external_cuda_training_launcher.sh|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint" scripts/build_external_cuda_operator_packet.py tests/scripts/test_build_external_cuda_operator_packet.py artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet.json artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet.md artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet_verification.json docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: Operator sequence tells operators to keep the packet file from the current checkout.
Operator sequence states packet.git.head is the required committed file source commit.
Packet verification remains GO for packet integrity only and warnings are empty.
Docs state that v0/M6 remain NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "Keep this packet file from the current checkout|packet.git.head is the required committed file source|verified_external_cuda_training_launcher.sh|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint" scripts/build_external_cuda_operator_packet.py tests/scripts/test_build_external_cuda_operator_packet.py artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet.json artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet.md artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet_verification.json docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
warnings: This gate does not produce real trained adapter evidence or run CUDA training.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Clarify packet operator sequence semantics without changing release acceptance or runtime behavior.
phase_notes.audit: The current packet says to clone/update to packet.git.head, but packet.git.head is only the required-file blob source commit; checking it out can hide the newer packet artifact.
phase_notes.build: Update packet generator wording/tests, regenerate packet JSON/Markdown/verification artifacts, and update LLM handoff docs.
phase_notes.check: Run JSON checks, focused generator test, py_compile, packet build/verify, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this checkout guidance phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Clarify external CUDA operator packet checkout guidance, update focused generator test, regenerated packet artifacts, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema changes, no catalog pin changes, no release acceptance weakening, no M6 GO docs, no model/adapter/Docker/evidence bundle commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
